About Contact 📞 Call Now: 301-352-4855
Personal Cybersecurity

You Think You've
Been Compromised.
You're Probably Right.

If your accounts have been accessed without your knowledge, your devices are behaving strangely, or you need digital evidence for a legal matter — our forensic investigators are ready to help. Confidentially. Immediately.

Call for Immediate Assistance Schedule a Confidential Consultation

All conversations are protected by NDA. We never share your information.

Are Any of These True for You?
  • Someone knows things they shouldn't — private messages, locations, conversations
  • Your accounts were accessed while you were asleep or away
  • Your ex, a stalker, or a business partner may have installed spyware
  • You need to prove infidelity, fraud, or harassment in court
  • You've received threats and need to identify who sent them
  • Your attorney asked for digital evidence you don't know how to gather
  • You suspect your phone, laptop, or home network has been tampered with
📞 Call Now — We Can Help
Warning Signs

You May Have Already
Been Compromised

Most victims don't know they've been hacked until significant damage is done. These are the signs that something is wrong.

📱
Device Behaving Strangely

Battery draining fast, unexplained data usage, apps opening on their own, or your phone running hot — these are classic signs of spyware or unauthorized access.

🔐
Accounts You Didn't Touch

Login alerts from cities you haven't visited. Password changes you didn't make. New security codes arriving unexpectedly. Your accounts may be under active access.

👁️
Someone Knows Too Much

A partner, ex, or colleague is referencing private conversations, your location, or financial details they shouldn't have access to. This is surveillance.

📧
Phishing or Targeted Threats

Receiving messages that reference your personal details, family members, or private activities. This is social engineering — someone has done research on you.

💼
Business or Financial Exposure

Suspicious transactions, accounts you don't recognize, or assets appearing in places you didn't put them. Digital forensics can trace the origin of financial fraud.

⚖️
You're Heading to Court

Divorces, business disputes, harassment cases, and custody battles increasingly turn on digital evidence. You need a certified expert to gather and preserve it properly.

How We Help

Personal Forensic Services

Each engagement is handled by a senior forensic analyst — not a call center. Your case is treated with the discretion and urgency it deserves.

i.

Device Forensic Examination

We examine your phone, laptop, tablet, or home network for signs of unauthorized access, installed spyware, hidden apps, or data exfiltration — without alerting the intruder.

iOS & Android Windows & Mac Network Analysis
ii.

Account Compromise & Recovery

If someone has taken over your email, social media, financial accounts, or cloud storage — we investigate how it happened, recover access, and secure you against re-entry.

Email Accounts Social Media Identity Theft
iii.

Digital Evidence for Legal Proceedings

Court-ready forensic reports usable in divorce, custody, harassment, business disputes, and civil litigation. We preserve the chain of custody so evidence holds up in court.

Family Law Civil Litigation Chain of Custody
iv.

Identity & Threat Investigation

We identify anonymous harassers, trace the origin of threats, expose fake accounts or impersonators, and build a documented case you can take to law enforcement or your attorney.

OSINT Threat Attribution Stalker Identification
v.

Privacy Restoration & Protection

After a breach, we remove your personal data from data brokers, eliminate your digital footprint, and set up ongoing monitoring so you know the moment anything resurfaces.

Data Broker Removal Dark Web Monitoring Ongoing Surveillance
vi.

Expert Witness & Court Testimony

Our principal analyst provides credible, defensible expert testimony in depositions, arbitration, and trial proceedings. Trusted by attorneys handling high-stakes digital cases.

Depositions Trial Testimony Attorney Support
"Digital evidence vanishes quickly. The moment you suspect something is wrong — every hour matters."
For Legal Matters

Building Your Case
Before Court

If you're working with an attorney on a divorce, custody dispute, harassment case, or civil fraud claim — we gather and preserve digital evidence in a format that is legally defensible and chain-of-custody compliant.

  • Text message and email deletion recovery
  • Proof of location via device and app data
  • Financial account access logs and unauthorized transfers
  • Hidden asset discovery via digital footprint analysis
  • Spyware documentation for restraining order proceedings
  • Social media account audit and screenshot authentication
  • Attorney-ready forensic reports with chain of custody
Call for Immediate Assistance
NDA-Protected Engagement
No Information Shared Without Consent
Senior Analyst Handles Your Case Directly
Evidence Admissible in U.S. Courts
Available 24/7 for Active Incidents
Get Help Now

Don't Wait.
Evidence Disappears.

The longer you wait, the harder it becomes to recover deleted data, trace unauthorized access, or build a legal case. Our forensic team is available now.
